SEARCH
程序包 mypakege

类 Student

java.lang.Object
tuition.Student
所有已实现的接口:
Comparable<Student>
public class Student extends Object implements Comparable<Student>
Represents a student eligible for registration. A student is identified by a Profile, and also has a Major and the number of completed credits. The standing is derived from completed credits (Freshman/Sophomore/Junior/Senior).
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

    Student(Profile profile, Major major, int creditCompleted)

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    int
    compareTo(Student o)
    Compares two students by their profiles.
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
    Checks whether this student is equal to another object.
    int
    getCreditCompleted()
    Returns the number of credits the student has completed.
    Major
    getMajor()
    Returns the student's major.
    Profile
    getProfile()
    Returns the student's profile.
    Standing
    getStanding()
    Computes the student's standing based on completed credits.
    String
    toString()
    Returns the string representation of the student in the required format: [First Last M/D/YYYY] [MAJOR,School] credits earned: N [Standing]

      private int creditCompleted

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Student

      public Student(Profile profile, Major major, int creditCompleted)
      Constructs a Student with the given profile, major, and completed credits.
      参数:
      profile - the student's profile (first name, last name, DOB)
      major - the student's major
      creditCompleted - the number of credits completed

  • 方法详细资料

    • getProfile

      public Profile getProfile()
      Returns the student's profile.
      返回:
      the profile

    • getMajor

      public Major getMajor()
      Returns the student's major.
      返回:
      the major

    • getCreditCompleted

      public int getCreditCompleted()
      Returns the number of credits the student has completed.
      返回:
      completed credits

    • getStanding

      public Standing getStanding()
      Computes the student's standing based on completed credits.
      返回:
      the student's standing (Freshman/Sophomore/Junior/Senior)

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Student o)
      Compares two students by their profiles. This ordering is used for sorting student lists by last name, first name, then DOB.
      指定者:
      compareTo 在接口中 Comparable<Student>
      参数:
      o - the other student to compare to
      返回:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this student is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified student

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Checks whether this student is equal to another object. Two students are considered equal if they have the same Profile.
      覆盖:
      equals 在类中 Object
      参数:
      obj - the object to compare with
      返回:
      true if the other object is a Student with the same profile; false otherwise

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the student in the required format: [First Last M/D/YYYY] [MAJOR,School] credits earned: N [Standing]
      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      formatted string for printing
